All Tools

Browse calculators, formatters, converters, and document tools by category. Each tool includes supporting content, examples, FAQs, and links to related resources.

The directory is designed to help users find the right utility quickly, then continue to the next relevant page instead of stopping at a dead end.

Search first

If you already know the task, use search to jump straight to the right tool.

Popular Categories

Developer

Developer tools help you format and inspect data quickly so bugs, payload issues, and handoff problems are easier to understand.

1 tools

Finance

Use finance tools to compare scenarios quickly, estimate returns or repayments, and make budgeting conversations easier before decisions become expensive.

9 tools

Health

Health tools provide a quick screening-style estimate so you can understand a simple metric before deciding whether to look deeper.

1 tools

Image

Image tools keep uploads, exports, and sharing tidy by making it easier to resize, compress, or convert assets for the destination you actually need.

4 tools

PDF

These document tools help you merge, split, compress, and convert PDFs without opening a heavy desktop workflow for a routine task.

5 tools

Text

Text tools simplify writing tasks like counting, reformatting, and adapting copy so you can meet platform limits without losing clarity.

3 tools

Utility

Utility tools handle everyday tasks that are small on their own but annoying when you have to do them manually more than once.

3 tools

Featured Reading

Finance

SIP Investing Guide for Beginners

A practical introduction to SIP investing, how compounding works, and what to review before starting.

Technology

Next.js SEO Checklist for Tool Websites

The core metadata, content, and internal-linking checks that help utility sites earn search visibility.

Business

Common GST Calculation Mistakes Small Businesses Make

A short guide to avoiding avoidable GST input errors when pricing, billing, and checking totals.

How to explore faster

  • Start with the search box if you know the tool name.
  • Use category pages when you want a broader comparison.
  • Open the matching blog post when you need practical background.

Free tools, calculators, and explainers built to be useful, transparent, and easy to navigate.
